title: Steyr, Upper Austria — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Steyr, Upper Austria: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Steyr is a city in Upper Austria with a population of 38,056. A historic industrial town at the confluence of the Enns and Steyr rivers, known for its well-preserved medieval old town and the Steyr Arms manufacturing heritage.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
